sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8464" key="a)nepi/frastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπί-φραστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unthought of,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δύαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
